title: YOUTH & FAMILIES - 211info
text: SPRINGFIELD EDUCATION OFFICE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH & EDUCATION SERVICES YOUTH & FAMILIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides educational classes, including English as a Second Language (ESL) and literacy classes. After school and summer youth enrichment programs with a focus on connecting with community resources, hearing from presenters on topics of interest, engaging in volunteer service activities, and gaining skills important for the future, such as resume building, scholarship writing, job searching, personal financial management, and navigating the health system. Child care is provided for ESL and literacy classes 1621 Centennial Boulevard Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Varies with a primarily focus is Latino and immigrant population Hours: Classes and youth enrichment: No standard hours Phone: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-1:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-noon Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-1:30pm, Tuesday/Thursday 9am-noon Services: English as a Second Language * Hispanic/Latino Community English as a Second Language * Immigrants Literacy Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Literacy Programs * Immigrants Youth Enrichment Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Youth Enrichment Programs * Immigrants Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH CARE EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - ADULT EDUCATION CLASSES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
